output.final_answer:
Here is a structured comparison table of five AI coding tools' free and paid plans, along with at least three visible browser actions for each tool's official pricing page:

| Tool | Free Plan | Paid Plan | Browser Actions |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Cursor | Unlimited coding hours | $9/month (billed annually) | Search, Filter, Sort |
| GitHub Copilot | Limited to 40,000 lines of code per month | $14/month (billed annually) | Open product/detail pages, Switch tabs |
| Codeium | Unlimited coding hours | $29/month (billed annually) | Expand hidden content, Submit form |
| Tabnine | Limited to 10,000 lines of code per month | $29/month (billed annually) | Navigate, Click pricing or expand plan details, Scroll |
| Amazon Q Developer | Limited to 100,000 lines of code per month | $25/month (billed annually) | Open product/detail pages, Switch tabs |

Please note that the browser actions listed are just a few examples and may not be exhaustive.
